title: redhat-rpm-config bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[289-1.0.1.1]
- Disabled changelog trimming for kernel-uek package [Orabug: 36807719]

[289-1.1]
- Add -specs=/usr/lib/rpm/redhat/redhat-hardened-ld-errors back to GCC ldflags (RHEL-91949)

[288-1.1]
- Add -mbranch-protection=standard to extension builder flags (RHEL-86099)
full_text:
[289-1.0.1.1]
- Disabled changelog trimming for kernel-uek package [Orabug: 36807719]

[289-1.1]
- Add -specs=/usr/lib/rpm/redhat/redhat-hardened-ld-errors back to GCC ldflags (RHEL-91949)

[288-1.1]
- Add -mbranch-protection=standard to extension builder flags (RHEL-86099)

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-16431.html
